_note: Manually-confirmed recipes read off the in-game anvil, for items the wiki gets wrong, leaves empty, or has no page for. Merged OVER the scraped wiki.json recipes: an override replaces any wiki recipe for the same result item, so our confirmed data wins and SURVIVES a re-scrape. Trivials are filled from recipe-observations.json (leave trivial null here). Add new ones as you read them off the anvil.
_knownIngredients: As of copper->bronze, Blacksmithing recipes only use: Copper Bar, Copper Plate, Rawhide Strap, Copper Chain Links (and Enchanted versions). Flux (e.g. Weak Flux) is deprecated from old updates — no recipe up to bronze uses it, so omit it even where a stale wiki page still lists it.

recipes.source: in-game anvil 2026-06-22 (wiki had 'x? Copper Bar + 1 Weak Flux'; flux is deprecated)
in-game anvil 2026-06-22 (wiki recipe section was empty)
